title: Email Engine — per-email input contract
description: The contract for a single email record consumed by prove-email.py and emitted to the Skill-44 draft build plan. A sequence ledger (emails.json) is an object with a top-level emails[] array of these records plus sequence-level fields (sequence_id, sequence_type, founder_name, process_certificate). SACRED framework/objective/persona-style/buyer-type value sets are frozen here and re-enforced by the prover.

e_slot.description: 1-based position in the sequence (1..10 or 1..12). Omitted for a standalone single email.

sequence_id.description: The catalog sequence id this email belongs to (e.g. sequence-landing-page-10-promo).

framework.description: One of the 13 canonical framework ids (SACRED).

objective.description: Exactly one of the 4 sequence objectives (SACRED).

buyer_type.description: The buyer band this slot serves (required for 12-email buyer-type / high-ticket sequences).

persona_style.description: Optional persona STYLE (tone only; the person is NEVER named/quoted). One of the 12 canonical styles.

subjects.description: Exactly two A/B subject lines, both non-empty.

previews.description: Preview text lines. Convert&Flow master = 1 line; high-ticket = 2 A/B lines.

body.description: The email body copy. 150-300 words (< 150 for the 3-B Plan). Contains {{contact.first_name}}, the CTA on its own line, and closes with the founder's actual name.

ctas.description: Call-to-action lines. >=1 per email; >=3 for the landing-page PASTOR emails (E1-3).

disruptive_elements.description: High-ticket only: >=1 named disruptive element (Consultation Value Inversion, Strategic Clarity Paradox, ...).

sections.description: Optional structured framework parts. When present, count must match the framework's declared part count (e.g. PASTOR = 6).

founder_name.description: The founder's actual name (also carried at the sequence level). Must appear in the body close; no placeholder token.

word_band_override.description: Client-exact override [min, max] word band. Honored verbatim over the 150-300 default and logged on the certificate.
